name: Hit a great skill check during repair
Open the hatch with a key
Escape a chase by entering a locker
Stun the killer with a pallet
Force the entity to block a window
Bless a totem
requires: (|Boon Circle of Healing| OR |Boon Shadow Step| OR |Boon Exponential| OR |Boon Dark Theory| OR |Boon Illumination|)

name: Open the chest in the basement
Hit a great skill check while healing another survivor
Wiggle off the killer
requires: (|Decisive Strike| OR |Flip-flop| AND |Unbreakable| AND |No Mither| AND |Boil Over| OR |Flip-flop| AND |Power Struggle|
